function.name: mios_build
function.description: Run the MiOS Containerfile build via Podman (calls the Justfile 'build' recipe or its Windows equivalent mios-build-local.ps1).

target_tag.description: Output tag, e.g. localhost/mios:dev or ghcr.io/mios-dev/mios:dev-2026.05.02. Lowercase repo namespace required.

base_image.description: Base image. MiOS default: ghcr.io/ublue-os/ucore-hci:stable-nvidia. Alternative: ghcr.io/ublue-os/ucore-hci:stable-nvidia-lts.

squash_all.description: Pass --squash-all to podman build. WARNING: strips OCI metadata bootc needs and breaks Day-2 deltas. Almost always false.

lint.description: Re-run `bootc container lint` against the built image. The Containerfile's final RUN already lints; this is a redundant check (LAW 4).

sign.description: Run cosign keyless sign on the resulting image. Requires GitHub Actions OIDC context — false for local builds.

rechunk.description: Run bootc-base-imagectl rechunk --max-layers 67 after build. Recommended for tags pushed to GHCR; skip for ephemeral builds.

platforms.description: Target platforms for multi-arch manifest list. MiOS currently ships amd64.
